title: Inner explorer agent loop with mode steering + tool gating (core::explore)
description: run_explore(question, &ExploreConfig, &dyn ChatClient) -> Result<ExploreAnswer>: agent loop exposing the 7 structural ops (internal ops:: calls) plus allowlisted shell tools to the inner model. Gating enforced at schema AND execution level. Modes as data: standard (free choice), aggressive (grove-first steering), balanced (harness-enforced two-phase recon+plan-commit then execute). Bounded turns/tokens. Unit tests with a scripted fake ChatClient: hallucinated-tool refusal, per-mode toolsets, balanced phase transition. Connection errors surface as a typed error for T04 shutdown.
